title: HUMMBL Review Request
description: Request from an author agent to the independent reviewer. Triggers construction of a review-packet.v1 and emission of a review-receipt.v1.

request_id.description: Unique request identifier assigned by the author.

requested_mode.description: fixture = local deterministic only; read_only = live GitHub inspection, no write; write_review = allowlisted comment/review post.

author_identity.description: GitHub login of the PR author. Must not match reviewer_identity.

requester_model.description: Model name of the agent that authored the PR. Used for same-model self-review detection.

review_focus.description: Optional areas the author wants reviewed (e.g. security, schema, performance).

operator_waiver.description: Operator waiver for same-model review on low-risk changes. Not permitted for security, governance, schema, integration, or authority changes.
